# Cookie Policy
## What are cookies?
Cookies are small text files that may be stored on your computer or other device when you visit a website. They are generally used to make websites work, to facilitate browsing on the website, to keep track of your movements within the website, to remember your login details, to optimize technical management, and so on.
## Why does this website use cookies?
GrowWeedEasy.com uses strictly necessary cookies for the website to function properly. Based on your consent, GrowWeedEasy.com also uses cookies to compile anonymous and aggregate statistics:
  * to analyse how the website is used by improve the use and the functionality of the website; and
  * to tailor the website and products to its audience’s needs and preferences.

Read our [privacy policy](https://www.growweedeasy.com/privacy-policy) to learn more about how GrowWeedEasy.com processes data.
## What cookies does GrowWeedEasy.com use?
The GrowWeedEasy.com website only uses Google Analytics cookies. Google Analytics is a web analysis service that measures how users interact with the site
On behalf of GrowWeedEasy.com and based on your consent, Google will use this information to assess your use of the website, to compile reports on website activity and to provide GrowWeedEasy.com with other services related to website and Internet use.
GrowWeedEasy.com uses the IP anonymization tool offered by Google Analytics in order to ensure anonymous collection of IP addresses (so-called IP masking).
As part of providing its services, Google may transfer, store and process your personal data in the United States or any other country in which Google maintains facilities under its standard contractual clauses available [here](https://privacy.google.com/businesses/processorterms/)
## How can you control cookies?
If you are in the EU, you can use these links to control your cookie preferences.
  * [Accept](javascript:cookie_accept\(\);) to allow collection and storage of your analytic data.
  * [Deny](javascript:cookie_deny\(\);) to prevent storage of your data (note that some information may still be sent to Google Analytics but no identifying information is used and no cookies are stored.)

Please note that we use a cookie to store your privacy preferences so we don’t have to ask you during each visit. You can return to this page at any time and use the links above to change your preferences.
You can prevent Google from collecting data relating to your use of the website and other websites by installing this opt-out tool: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout?hl=en. For more information on terms of use and data protection, please visit [https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/6004245](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/6004245).
You can also delete or block cookies by changing the settings on your browser. For more information on how to configure your browser, please visit:[https://www.allaboutcookies.org/manage-cookies/](https://www.allaboutcookies.org/manage-cookies/).
If you use different devices to access our websites, you will need to ensure that each browser of each device is set to your cookie preference.

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
